_comment: TheChoseone delegation routes. Each route declares trigger phrases, the honest worker target, the default execution mode when no live worker bridge exists, and a safety note. Nothing here grants execution; codex/claude/opencode stay dry_run_only until a bridge is verified at runtime.

research.safety_note: Drafts a research task / cites sources only. No browsing with paid APIs, no applying, no activating links.

showroom.safety_note: Builds/records a draft offer for showroom review. Never publishes, charges, emails, or auto-approves.

proof_automation.safety_note: Proof automation runs in dry-run only; produces receipts, takes no outward action.

codex.safety_note: No verified Codex bridge -> recorded as dry_run_only with a copy/paste prompt. Never claims it ran.

claude.safety_note: No verified Claude bridge -> recorded as dry_run_only with a copy/paste prompt. Never claims it ran.

opencode.safety_note: No verified OpenCode bridge -> recorded as dry_run_only with a copy/paste prompt. Never claims it ran.

trading.safety_note: Education/demo analysis only. No live trades, no money movement, no account changes.

blocked.safety_note: Outward/irreversible action without approval -> blocked. Nothing runs.
